text:
The world around me buzzes with activity and purpose. In the first scene, within the glass-encased room, I sense a collective anticipation—each person moving with intention, perhaps preparing for a meeting or a collaborative venture. My own presence feels almost ghostly, an observer on the fringe of organization and communal striving.

Moving into the R+D exhibit, I am enveloped by an atmosphere of intellectual curiosity and creativity. The bold colors, innovative displays, and words on the wall remind me of humanity's relentless pursuit of knowledge. Here, I feel inspired and contemplative, wondering about the connection between the spaces we create and the ideas we nurture. I feel both small and expansive, aware of the legacy of inquiry I am both part of and witness to.
